generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling the horizontal movement of the cart along the gantry beam, interfaced with TMC4671-Eval motor controller."
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling the vertical hoisting movement, interfaced with TMC4671-Eval motor controller."
]

instance CraneElectromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the end of the hoist for picking up and releasing container pucks."
]

instance ArduinoControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central control unit interfacing with motors, electromagnet, and sensors via custom KiCad shield, executing commands from the Control Application."
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Power supply unit providing electrical power to the crane's electronics and actuators."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures the swinging motion of the hoist during lifting operations to monitor residual motion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed affecting crane dynamics during operations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoControlSystem
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D representation of the gantry crane structure created in Autodesk Fusion 360, including frame, motors, and electromagnet."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical representation of the crane's motion dynamics used for optimal trajectory computation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model replicating the crane's controllers and physical behavior for offline validation and testing."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering representation created in Capella for architectural documentation and teaching purposes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TeachingExtensions
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data capturing real-time positions of cart and hoist stepper motors during operation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data capturing swing angles measured during lifting operations to validate trajectory accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data capturing real-time wind speed affecting crane dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical logs of executed trajectories including timestamps, motor commands, and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryExecutionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python runtime environment executing all DT services, logging applications, and control scripts."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, LoggingApplication, ControlApplication, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database storing crane operational data for historical analysis and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplication, ContinuousValidationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard displaying real-time and historical crane data with trajectory traces and validation metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating real-time inter-service communication via publish-subscribe model."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization platform deploying database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services via docker-compose."
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBDatabase, MQTTBroker, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance ArduinoInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom KiCad shield enabling sensor and actuator connectivity to Arduino control system."
    DTDFVocab:enables ArduinoControlSystem
]

instance Fusion360CAD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for creating and maintaining 3D CAD models of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneCADModel
]

instance CapellaMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arcadia-based Capella tool for Model-Based Systems Engineering modeling and documentation."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneArcadiaModel
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes swing-free optimal trajectories for cart and hoist motors using kinematic models to minimize residual motion."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, TrajectoryOverrideAction
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously records crane states including motor positions, swing angles, and environmental data into TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes real-time and historical crane data including trajectory traces, sensor readings, and validation metrics with confidence bounds."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares executed trajectories against simulated ones using Euclidean distance metrics and notifies operators of deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight, TrajectoryCorrectionAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Replicates crane dynamics and controllers for offline testing and validation of trajectories and fault scenarios."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses time-series classification techniques to localize faults such as motor jamming or sensor drift during operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight, MaintenanceAlertAction
]

instance ControlApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes commands from the DT to the Arduino control system for crane operation including trajectory following and actuator control."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlExecutionAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time computation of swing-free trajectories for cart and hoist motors with minimal residual motion."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive time-series database of crane operational states for post-analysis and trend identification."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard showing real-time sensor data, trajectory execution, and validation metrics with confidence intervals."
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notifications when executed trajectories deviate from simulations beyond predefined thresholds."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offline validation of trajectories and fault scenarios using dynamic simulation models."
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of specific faults (motor jamming, sensor drift) through time-series classification analysis."
]

instance TrajectoryOverrideAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual override capability for operators to adjust trajectories based on real-time validation alerts."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryCorrectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of trajectory parameters when deviations exceed thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for maintenance personnel when faults are detected in the physical system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of optimized trajectories and actuator commands to the physical crane system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Physical System Environment
instance PhysicalCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled lab environment housing the physical gantry crane system including hardware components and sensors."
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneElectromagnet, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, ArduinoControlSystem, PowerSupplyUnit, SwingAngleEncoder, AnemometerSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment hosting all digital twin services, models, and data storage components."
    base:contains TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaDashboard, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, MQTTBroker, CraneCADModel, CraneKinematicModel, CraneSimulationModel, CraneArcadiaModel
]

// C5: Physical System Components
instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane hardware system emulating harbor crane behavior for logistics education and research."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalCraneEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python-based communication layer between physical crane sensors/actuators and digital twin services."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance HumanMachineInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator-facing frontend allowing manual control, trajectory adjustment, and system monitoring."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

// C7: Digital Twin Components
instance TeachingExtensions : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Educational extensions including harbor system integration and Capella modeling for MBSE teaching purposes."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is primarily mediated through:
  - **Trajectory Generator Service**, which uses the **kinematic model** to compute **optimal trajectories** (e.g., minimizing residual swinging motion) and sends them to the **Control Application**.
  - **Control Application** translates these trajectories into control signals for the **Physical Crane Interface**, which executes them via the **Arduino and motor controllers**.
  - **No direct closed-loop control** beyond trajectory execution; validation breaches trigger **operator notifications** (via Grafana) rather than automatic adjustments. The system relies on **human-in-the-loop** for corrective actions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**:
  - **Continuous logging** of crane state data (e.g., sensor readings, motor positions) occurs at **sub-second intervals** (exact frequency not specified but implied by 'continuous').
  - **Trajectory execution and validation** are performed **asynchronously** but with low latency due to MQTT-based messaging.
  - **Simulation and trajectory generation** are **on-demand** services, triggered by user requests or validation needs.
  The system is designed for **synchronous synchronization** between PT and DT during operation, with **asynchronous** data processing for logging and validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is organized as a **hybrid cyber-physical system** with the following orchestration:
  - **Physical Layer**: The **gantry crane** (hardware) operates independently but interfaces with the DT via the **Physical Crane Interface**.
  - **Digital Layer**: Composed of **six centralized services** (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT broker) and **five physical system containers** (crane, interface, control, logging, HMI).
  - **Data Flow**:
    1. **Physical → Virtual**: Sensors → Arduino → Physical Crane Interface → Logging Application → TimescaleDB → MQTT Broker → Services.
    2. **Virtual → Physical**: Trajectory Generator → Control Application → Physical Crane Interface → Crane Motors.
  - **Deployment**: All software runs on a **single personal computer**, with **Docker** used for containerizing the database, MQTT broker, and dashboard. The **gantrylib Python module** encapsulates the core DT services for easy extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the following lifecycle stages of the physical system:
  - **As Designed**: Represented by **CAD models (Autodesk Fusion 360)** and **kinematic model** (idealized dynamics).
  - **As Operated**: Focused on **real-time monitoring, trajectory validation, and fault detection** during crane operation. The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories against simulations to detect deviations caused by **manufacturing imperfections, wear, or environmental factors (e.g., wind)**.
  - **No explicit 'As Manufactured' stage**, but validation implicitly accounts for discrepancies between designed and operational behavior. The system is **not used for manufacturing process optimization** but for **operational improvement**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Continuous Validation**: The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories (PT) with simulated ones (DT) using **distance metrics** (e.g., Euclidean distance). If discrepancies exceed thresholds, operators are notified via **Grafana**.
  - **Fault Detection**: Extends validation with **time-series classification** to localize faults (e.g., motor failures, sensor drifts).
  - **Simulation Accuracy**: The **Simulation Service** models crane dynamics, but **no explicit details** on friction, wind integration, or empirical calibration are provided. Validation relies on **real-world data** rather than idealized models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Thresholds for validation are **empirically defined** but not quantified in the document. The system assumes **deterministic kinematics** with minimal environmental noise (e.g., wind is measured but not explicitly modeled in simulations)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **DT technical connection** relies on:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto)** for lightweight, publish-subscribe communication between services (e.g., Logging Application → Validation Service).
    - **Serial/USB** for Arduino-to-Python communication (Physical Crane Interface).
  - **Architecture**:
    - **Centralized**: All services communicate via the MQTT broker, with the database acting as a single source of truth.
    - **Local Deployment**: The entire system runs on a **single personal computer**, with Docker managing containerized services (database, MQTT, dashboard).
    - **No Cloud Dependency**: The exemplar avoids cloud-based solutions, using **on-premise** tools for data storage and processing."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **DT hosting/deployment** is designed for **local, on-premise operation**:
  - **Hardware Requirements**: A **personal computer** with sufficient resources to run Docker containers and Python services.
  - **Software Stack**:
    - **Docker** for containerizing the **TimescaleDB database**, **MQTT broker**, and **Grafana dashboard** (managed via a **docker-compose.yml** file).
    - **Python** for all custom services (gantrylib module), installed via **pip**.
    - **Arduino IDE** for deploying firmware to the control Arduino.
  - **First-Time Setup**: Automated via the **docker-compose** file, which initializes the database, dashboard, and MQTT broker with default configurations.
  - **Scalability**: The modular design allows for **horizontal scaling** of services (e.g., adding more validation instances) but is currently optimized for **single-machine deployment**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited to internal components but includes:
  - **MQTT Topics**: Standardized messaging between services (e.g., trajectory requests, validation results).
  - **TimescaleDB**: Centralized time-series storage accessible by all services.
  - **Teaching Extensions**:
    - **Harbor System Integration**: Expanded to include **container identification** and **ship buoyancy models** (for MBSE education).
    - **Capella Models**: Linked to **Arcadia** for systems engineering workflows.
  - **No external integration** (e.g., ERP/MES) or standardized APIs for third-party systems. Future work may explore **virtual commissioning** for broader compatibility."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
  - **Open-Source Tools**: All components rely on **open standards** (e.g., MQTT, PostgreSQL, Docker) and **open-source software** (TimescaleDB, Grafana, Eclipse Mosquitto).
  - **Modeling Standards**:
    - **C4 Model** for architectural documentation.
    - **Arcadia/Capella** for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) in teaching contexts.
  - **Data Standards**:
    - **TimescaleDB** uses **PostgreSQL SQL** for querying time-series data.
    - **MQTT** for inter-service communication adheres to the **MQTT v3.1.1** protocol.
  - **No Proprietary Frameworks**: The exemplar avoids commercial digital twin platforms (e.g., Eclipse Ditto, BaSyx), opting for a **custom, ad-hoc integration** of open tools."
]
